title: Tadka Scrambled Eggs
description: A smoky and juicy quick-fix Russian dish featuring eggs seasoned with tadka (mixed spices) for a low-carb-friendly breakfast option.

ingredients.name: Tadka Seasoning Mix (e.g., Garam Masala, Cumin Seeds, Turmeric Powder)

instructions: Crack eggs into a mixing bowl.
Add tadka seasoning mix, vegetable stock, salt, and pepper. Mix well until evenly combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Pour in the egg mixture.
Stir quickly to scramble the eggs thoroughly without letting them set too much. Cook for about 2 minutes or until desired doneness is reached.
